Container.Name: VaultRequestrr
Container.Overview: A Discord bot that requests movies and TV shows through Seerr (the Overseerr/Jellyseerr successor). The first time a user requests something, the bot asks for their Plex username/email and links their Discord account to their Seerr user, so every request is attributed to them and their per-user quotas/limits are respected. The link is stored locally (SQLite) and written back into Seerr notification settings. No inbound ports or WebUI — the bot only makes outbound connections.
Container.Description: A Discord bot that requests media via Seerr with self-service Plex account linking so per-user quotas are respected. Set your Discord bot token and Seerr admin API key below.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Stores the SQLite database of Discord↔Seerr account links. Keep this on persistent storage.

Config.Name: Seerr URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Seerr instance, including port. Use your LAN address, e.g. http://10.10.0.10:5055

Config.Name: Seerr API Key
Config.Description: Seerr API key (Settings → General → API Key). Must belong to an admin user.

Config.Name: Discord Guild ID
Config.Description: Optional: your Discord server ID. Set it so slash commands register instantly (otherwise global registration can take up to ~1 hour). Enable Developer Mode in Discord, right-click the server icon → Copy Server ID.

Config.Name: Require Linking
Config.Description: Require users to link a Plex account before their first request (recommended: true).

Config.Name: Default Seerr User ID
Config.Description: Optional fallback Seerr user id used only when Require Linking is false.

Config.Name: Dashboard Password
Config.Description: Set a password to enable the admin web dashboard (view/manage links, activity, settings). Leave blank to disable the dashboard.

Config.Name: Dashboard Port
Config.Description: Host port for the admin dashboard. Only used when a Dashboard Password is set.

Config.Name: Notify When Available
Config.Description: DM the requester when their movie/season becomes available.

Config.Name: Notify When Declined
Config.Description: DM the requester when an admin declines their request.

Config.Name: Poll Interval (seconds)
Config.Description: How often to poll Seerr for request status changes (0 disables notifications).
